name: Monumental Gold Corp.
summary: Monumental Gold Corp., a development stage company, engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in Canada. The company focuses its exploration activities on precious metals in the southeast area of Kamloops, British Columbia. It has an option agreement to acquire 100% interest in the Weyman property that includes eight mineral claims covering approximately 2,968.83 hectares in the Kamloops and Nicola Mining Divisions and in the Thompson Nicola Regional District, British Columbia. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
